_note: Competitive PvP/arena thumbnails: two sides clashing, competitive energy, tournament/ranked feel. The 'BEST PVP BUILD' / 'RANKED GAMEPLAY' / 'HOW TO WIN EVERY FIGHT' category. More chaotic energy than vs_matchup — this is mid-combat, not a face-off pose.
